tokenColors.name: Regular expressions — special chars (anchors, groups, quantifiers)
Language constants — true / false / null / undefined / None / nil
Keywords — control flow (if / for / while / switch / case…)
Keywords — return / yield / throw / raise / break / continue (jump)
Keywords — import / export / from / as / require (module boundary)
Storage — declaration keywords (var / let / const / function / fn / def)
Storage — type-definition keywords (class / interface / type / enum / struct)
Storage — module keywords (namespace / module / import / export / annotation)
Storage modifiers — async / static / public / private / protected
Storage modifiers — abstract / declare / override / implements (TS/Java special)
Classes & named types (the identifier, not the keyword)
Namespace / module / package identifiers (the name after import/use)
